headline: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Uniform and facility services provider Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 8.9% year on year to $2.84 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $11.23 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $1.24 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations

The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $11.23 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $1.24 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
summary: CINCINNATI, March 25, 2026--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) today reported results for its fiscal 2026 third quarter ended February 28, 2026. Revenue for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 was $2.84 billion compared to $2.61 billion in last year’s third quarter, an increase of 8.9%. The organic revenue growth rate for the third quarter of fiscal 2026, which adjusts for the impacts of acquisitions and foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations, was 8.2%.

raw.headline: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
raw.summary: CINCINNATI, March 25, 2026--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) today reported results for its fiscal 2026 third quarter ended February 28, 2026. Revenue for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 was $2.84 billion compared to $2.61 billion in last year’s third quarter, an increase of 8.9%. The organic revenue growth rate for the third quarter of fiscal 2026, which adjusts for the impacts of acquisitions and foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations, was 8.2%.

headline: The War’s Economic Impact: What to Watch the Rest of the Week
